_comment: Copy this file to config/config.json and fill in the real values. The DLL searches for config.json next to the DLL, then in the game directory, then at %HNBOT_CONFIG%. All offsets/patterns below are PLACEHOLDERS - see docs/FINDING_OFFSETS.md for how to find the real ones for your build with Cheat Engine or Dumper-7.

resolve._comment: How to locate the GWorld global. mode='rva' uses module_base+rva. mode='pattern' AOB-scans the module; if rip_relative=true the 4-byte displacement at (match+pattern_offset) is resolved as a RIP-relative address using instruction_length.

player._comment: Cheat Engine pointer chains, applied from the GWorld VARIABLE ADDRESS (module_base + resolved gworld). The first offset is usually 0x0 (deref GWorld to get the UWorld*). The last offset is the field offset of the value; it is NOT dereferenced. See docs/FINDING_OFFSETS.md.
